issue_title: fix(storybook-framework-web-components): watch code changes and auto-reload by default
issue_body_preview:
## What I did

1. set `watch: true` to enable auto-reload by default

We implemented the baseline for auto-reload here https://github.com/modernweb-dev/web/pull/2482
But I overlooked the fact that `watch: true` wasn't set by default.
It should be, because it's expected of the Storybook to have
test_description_zh: 在 Storybook (web-components 框架) 开发环境下，修改组件源代码后，观察 Storybook 页面是否自动重新加载并展示最新的代码变更。
expected_result_zh: 修改组件代码并保存后，Storybook 页面应自动检测到文件变更并重新加载，无需手动刷新浏览器即可看到最新的组件效果。
